name: SolarWinds APM
description: SolarWinds APM — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in APM.

seo.title: SolarWinds APM Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete SolarWinds APM analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: SolarWinds APM is a Performance Monitoring / APM tool.
pros: Pinpoints performance bottlenecks with distributed tracing
cons: Per-host or per-seat pricing grows quickly with team size
review.best_for: Teams debugging latency and reliability issues
review.not_for: Simple scripts or batch jobs with no latency SLA
